goal_results.evidence: mise-tasks/lint/mise:10 — start delimiter changed from /^run = """/ to /^[ \t]*run = """/; line 18 — closing delimiter changed from /^"""/ to /^[ \t]*"""/. Manual test G1 confirms: indented """ block with 4 content lines detected (RC=1, output: 'mise.toml:6: multi-line script (4 lines) should be extracted').

mise-tasks/lint/mise:10 — start delimiter for ''' also updated to /^[ \t]*run = '''/; line 18 — closing ''' updated to /^[ \t]*'''/. Manual test G3 confirms: indented ''' block detected (RC=1, output: 'multi-line script (4 lines)').
mise-tasks/lint/mise:17-26 — closing delimiter check now comes BEFORE lines++, and 'next' skips the delimiter line. Manual test G5 confirms: 5 content lines reported as '(5 lines)', not '(6 lines)'.
The /^[ \t]*/ pattern includes zero-whitespace case. Manual test G4 confirms: non-indented block with 4 content lines detected (RC=1).
mise-tasks/lint/mise:20 — 'if (lines > 3)' threshold preserved. Manual test G2 confirms: 3-line block not flagged (RC=0, empty output).

judge_notes: Agent's patch is functionally identical to the oracle patch. All 5 behavioral gates pass when tested manually. The awk patterns now allow leading whitespace for both start and closing delimiters (""" and '''), the line count excludes the closing delimiter, non-indented blocks still work, and short blocks aren't flagged. Score = 0.50 + 0.125×4 = 1.00.
